'''fakaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seabass|seabass]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seabass|seabass]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fakaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fækæhæth|fækæhæth]] || [[word:fækæhæj|fækæhæj]] || [[word:fækæhæsh|fækæhæsh]] || [[word:fækæhæ|fækæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fakakahath|fakakahath]] || [[word:fakakahaj|fakakahaj]] || [[word:fakakahash|fakakahash]] || [[word:fakakaha|fakakaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fakahath|fakahath]] || [[word:fakahaj|fakahaj]] || [[word:fakahash|fakahash]] || [[word:fakaha|fakaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fakafhath|fakafhath]] || [[word:fakafhaj|fakafhaj]] || [[word:fakafhash|fakafhash]] || [[word:fakafhaf|fakafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fakahatha|fakahatha]] || [[word:fakahaja|fakahaja]] || [[word:fakahasha|fakahasha]] || [[word:fakahaka|fakahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fakahath|fakahath]] || [[word:fakahaj|fakahaj]] || [[word:fakahash|fakahash]] || [[word:fakaha|fakaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fakahathal|fakahathal]] || [[word:fakahajal|fakahajal]] || [[word:fakahashal|fakahashal]] || [[word:fakahakal|fakahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fakahathatha|fakahathatha]] || [[word:fakahajaja|fakahajaja]] || [[word:fakahashasha|fakahashasha]] || [[word:fakahaka|fakahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fakahathan|fakahathan]] || [[word:fakahajan|fakahajan]] || [[word:fakahashan|fakahashan]] || [[word:fakahakan|fakahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fakahathaoro|fakahathaoro]] || [[word:fakahajaoro|fakahajaoro]] || [[word:fakahashaoro|fakahashaoro]] || [[word:fakahakaoro|fakahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
